title: Building with ADK & A2A: How multi-agent collaboration designs a game
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates multi-agent collaboration using the Agent Development Kit and Agent2Agent protocol, where distinct AI agents coordinate on game design tasks. The demo showcases a human-in-the-loop framework integrating architecture, asset rendering, and project management agents.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates multi-agent collaboration built on the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol, applied to game design tasks. The demo coordinates distinct agents for architecture, asset rendering, and project management, with a human-in-the-loop framework keeping a person in the workflow. It shows how ADK and A2A handle agent orchestration so specialized agents can interoperate on a shared objective.
